message:
fix: deep audit round 3 — credential leaks, overflow, DoS vectors

Airtable:
- Redact mac_secret_base64 in CreateWebhookResponse Debug impl
  (webhook HMAC secret was exposed via derive(Debug))

Telegram:
- Parse retry_after from response body JSON when header is missing
  (Telegram sends {"parameters":{"retry_after":N}} on 429, not
  just Retry-After header; old code defaulted to 5s, causing bans)

fcp-host:
- Fix log sequence counter: += to saturating_add (prevents wrap to 0
  after 2^64 logs, matching how other sequence counters are handled)
- Cap exponential backoff infinity: check is_infinite() alongside
  is_nan() to prevent Duration overflow from powi(i32::MAX)
- Clamp journal query limit to 10,000 entries to prevent OOM from
  malicious limit: usize::MAX requests

fcp-sdk:
- Enforce minimum 1ms base_backoff in RetryPolicy to prevent tight
  busy-wait loops when base_backoff_ms=0 (was a documented but
  dangerous configuration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
